content.claim: Hungary's 2023 teacher-career reform (Act LII) and targeted subject-teacher incentive funding for talent development aim at non-structural quality improvement but have not been evaluated for impact on equity gaps documented in international assessments
content.context: Fresh live research through the Portuguese system reform lens
limitations: No outcome evaluation available comparing equity effects of non-structural measures alone versus combined structural-and-non-structural reform
Cannot assess whether quality measures compensate for early tracking or address underlying segregation mechanisms
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
